title: Login identity and arbitrary group sharing
summary: Keep API key principals as canonical API identities and add Cloudflare Access login principals.
Add display-only user profile fields for name, email, company, and organization.
Add tenant-scoped arbitrary groups and resource ACL sharing for decision memories and knowledge docs.
Evaluate restricted decision memory and knowledge doc reads with authenticated principal plus group memberships.

included: resource sharing endpoints and ACL tables
restricted-read filtering for decision memories and knowledge docs
tests, env examples, README, and governed docs
excluded: third-party IdP user provisioning beyond Cloudflare Access JWT claims
